title: Freshers Welcome Night
description: Kick off the year with live music, free food, and meet your classmates.

title: Python for Beginners Workshop
description: Hands-on intro to Python programming. Laptops required.

title: Rocky FC Football Trials
description: Open trials for the college football team. All skill levels welcome.

title: Halloween Quiz Night
description: Fancy dress encouraged. Teams of 4. Prize for the winners.

title: CV & Interview Skills Seminar
description: Careers office workshop on writing CVs and acing interviews.

title: Art Society Exhibition Opening
description: Student artwork on display. Free entry. Refreshments provided.

title: Mindfulness & Wellbeing Session
description: Guided mindfulness session run by the student wellbeing team.

title: Debate Society: AI in Education
description: Is AI a help or a hindrance in third-level education? Come argue both sides.

title: Christmas Charity Bake Sale
description: Bake or buy. All proceeds go to the local food bank.

title: End of Semester Film Night
description: Wind down before the holidays with a classic movie, popcorn included.
